skills.name: Barong
skills.description: Manipulate captured Barong. Barong appears near an enemy that has been targeted within distance with Defense equal to 150% of the caster's Physical and Magic Defense. By attacking the enemy during the duration, Barong removes the buff by a 20% of chance.
skills.effect_text:
Barong Skill factor: 100%
Skill factor: SkillFactor % per 1 second
Targets: 10
Duration: CaptionTime second

skills.name: Luka
skills.description: Attack enemies giving bleeding damage over time. Duration increases based on the number of debuffs applied on the target. (Max 5 seconds)
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 0.5 seconds
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Kutukan
skills.description: Inflict [Chaotic Curse] on a targeted enemy. Enemies inflicted with [Chaotic Curse] transform into an immovable [Kepa] and become unable to restore HP and SP, dealing damage over time to nearby enemies and themselves based on user’s AoE Ratio. When the enemy is dead or incapable of combat during [Chaotic Curse], the debuff is contagious to a nearby enemy for the time remaining. (Boss monsters on certain grades are immune to [Chaotic Curse], debuff chances are applied (50 + Keletihan debuff stacks * 10]% during PVP)
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Penyerapan
skills.effect_text: Rangda Skill Damage increases by CaptionRatio %

skills.name: Keletihan
skills.description: Exhaust enemies in range. [Fatigue] debuff decreases victim’s Accuracy, Evasion, and Critical Resistance. The decrease is in proportion to [Keletihan: Fatigue] stacks
skills.effect_text:
Accuracy, Evasion decreases by CaptionRatio % * [number of stacks]
Critical Resistance decreases by CaptionRatio3 % * [number of stacks]
Targets: CaptionRatio2
Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Rawa
skills.description: Form a swamp in front of the caster. Swamp slows down enemies and increases Rawa stacks on enemies. More stacks increase Movement Speed reduction and damage dealt by Rawa.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 0.6 seconds
Target: CaptionRatio3
Damage +1% per stack
Movement speed - CaptionRatio per stack
Swampy Area Duration: CaptionTime seconds
Rawa Debuff Duration: CaptionRatio2 seconds

attributes.name: Barong: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases skill factor of [Barong] by 0.5% per attribute level

* Additional 10% increases at maximum level

attributes.name: Luka: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Luka] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Kutukan: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Kutukan] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Rawa: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Rawa] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Barong: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: Increases the skill factor of [Barong] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Luka: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: Increases the skill factor of [Luka] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Kutukan: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Kutukan] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Rawa: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Rawa] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Barong: Absorption
attributes.description:
* When Barong attacks the enemy, the duration of Barong increases by [The number of Keletihan stacks * 10] seconds applied to the enemy and the Keletihan debuff applied to the enemy gets deleted

* Absorption re-activates 30 seconds after activating

* Increases Cooldown by 10 seconds

attributes.name: Kutukan: Buff Removal
attributes.description:
* Enemy inflicted with Kutukan loses 1~[attribute level] buff(s) at a chance

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Keletihan: Added Effect
attributes.description:
* Inflicts debuffs depending on Keletihan stacks

- Inflicts [Curse] for 10 seconds on 2 stacks

- Inflicts [Silence] for 3 seconds on 3 stacks

- Inflicts [Stun] for 3 seconds on 4 stacks

- (Renew [Curse] after 4 stacks)

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Rawa: Fatigue Boost
attributes.description:
* When an enemy standing on [Rawa] while inflicted with [Keletihan], [Keletihan] debuff stack increases every 3 seconds (Does not renew duration)

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Penyerapan: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Penyerapan]'s damage by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Penyerapan: Energy Drain
attributes.description: * [Keletihan: Fatigue] and [Rawa] debuff of enemies near Penyerapan is removed. Instead, it recovers the caster’s HP based on the number of debuffs on nearby enemies every 20 seconds. (Up to 50% of caster’s max. HP)

attributes.name: [Arts] Luka: Redakan
attributes.description:
* Instead of not applying Bleeding to the enemy, 15 times of damage applies to wide ranged enemy

Applies AoE Attack Ratio of skill by 2 times
